_comment: Structured registry of EXTERNAL assets used directly in the build. Every entry MUST have a license + attribution + sourceUrl. Validated by tools/validate-assets.js; human-readable mirror in ASSET_CREDITS.md. Procedural (code-drawn) art is NOT listed here — it has no external license.

assets.usedFor: Enemy models: skeleton + ember-skeleton (runtime orange recolor)
assets.source: Universal LPC Spritesheet (Liberated Pixel Cup base assets)
assets.modifications: Cropped the walk-cycle rows (up/left/down/right) out of the full universal sheet into a 576x256 sprite; ember-skeleton variant is an orange multiply recolor at load.

assets.usedFor: Enemy model: zombie (LPC human body recolored sickly green at load)
assets.source: Universal LPC Spritesheet (Liberated Pixel Cup base assets)
assets.modifications: Cropped the walk-cycle rows out of the full LPC human body sheet into a 576x256 sprite; recolored toward sickly green at load to read as a zombie.

assets.source: Universal LPC Spritesheet (Liberated Pixel Cup base assets)
assets.modifications: Cropped the walk-cycle rows out of the full LPC orc body sheet into a 576x256 sprite.

assets.usedFor: Recolorable cloak cosmetic for the LPC-bodied playable heroes (menu + in-game)
assets.source: Universal LPC Spritesheet (Liberated Pixel Cup base assets)
assets.modifications: Cropped the front (down) standing frame from the LPC behind-body cape sheet into a single 182x182 sprite; recolored per equipped cloak colour at runtime.

assets.usedFor: Updated original creature enemies: slime, bat, crawler (snake), spitter (eyeball), mite (bee)
assets.modifications: Sliced the front-facing (down) animation row from each 64px monster sheet and upscaled crisp to the sprite box. Sheets in this set: slime.png, bat.png, snake.png, eyeball.png, bee.png — same source/authors/license.

assets.usedFor: World ground floor texture (recolored per biome by the map theme)
assets.modifications: Downscaled the 1K seamless diffuse map to a 256x256 tile; recolored per biome at runtime via the existing map ground-fill/grade overlay.

assets.usedFor: UI card glyphs (gear/cosmetic/element), recolored by rarity
assets.modifications: Rasterized the SVGs to 128px white-on-transparent PNGs (background rect stripped); recolored by rarity at load. Other glyphs in this set: spark.png, fire.png, lightning.png, frost.png, skull.png, swords.png, staff.png — same source/author/license.

assets.usedFor: Hybrid SFX one-shots (played over the procedural fallback): enemy-kill punch + player-hurt heavy punch
assets.modifications: Copied a curated subset of the pack's OGG one-shots unchanged; pitch-jittered + gain-trimmed at runtime. Files in this set: impactPunch_medium_000.ogg, impactPunch_medium_001.ogg, impactPunch_medium_003.ogg, impactPunch_heavy_000.ogg, impactPunch_heavy_002.ogg — same source/author/license.

assets.usedFor: Hybrid SFX one-shots: coin pickup, shop purchase (leather pouch), weapon equip (metal click), chest open (metal latch)
assets.modifications: Copied a curated subset of the pack's OGG one-shots unchanged; pitch-jittered + gain-trimmed at runtime. Files in this set: handleCoins.ogg, handleCoins2.ogg, handleSmallLeather.ogg, handleSmallLeather2.ogg, metalClick.ogg, metalLatch.ogg — same source/author/license.

assets.usedFor: Hybrid SFX one-shots: UI click, UI hover tick, XP-gem glass ping, level-up reroll scratch
assets.modifications: Copied a curated subset of the pack's OGG one-shots unchanged; pitch-jittered + gain-trimmed at runtime. Files in this set: click_001.ogg, click_002.ogg, tick_001.ogg, tick_002.ogg, glass_001.ogg, glass_003.ogg, glass_005.ogg, scratch_001.ogg, scratch_003.ogg — same source/author/license.

assets.usedFor: One-shot featured main-menu composition, streamed lazily and followed by the original procedural playlist
assets.modifications: MP3 attachment used unchanged. The full 2:38 track plays once through a lazy HTMLAudioElement; it is not presented as the separate seamless-loop WAV and is never decoded into a large AudioBuffer. Direct attachment: https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/The_Bards_Tale.mp3

assets.usedFor: Four optional, captioned boss-arrival/phase stingers with semantically restricted boss mappings
assets.source: Higgsfield Audio output from original EMBERWAKE-written lines
authors: EMBERWAKE project (original text and prompt direction); Higgsfield Audio (generation tool)
assets.modifications: Generated files used unchanged: dark_found_you.mp3, hollow_answers.mp3, warden_wakes.mp3, only_embers_remain.mp3. Terms reviewed 2026-07-13: commercial use is not restricted, while originality/legality/non-infringement are not warranted; exact lines, semantic mappings, captions, and silent fallbacks are documented in src/assets/audio/CREDITS.md.

assets.usedFor: Main-menu display face — the EMBERWAKE wordmark, tab labels, and button labels (headings only; body text keeps the system stack)
assets.modifications: Latin-subset variable woff2 (weight 500–800) self-hosted and loaded via FontFace in src/assets/MenuFont.js; canvas text falls back to the system sans until the face loads (and in a non-DOM env).
